description: School Staff Interaction Action Type - Add 7th required action type for PM school visits: a 2-question binary+remark checklist. IMPORTANT: Before starting each story, read these three files for full context: (1) docs/ai/project-context.md (2) ralph/prd-school-staff-interaction.md (3) docs/ai/school-staff-interaction/2026-03-22-school-staff-interaction-implementation-plan.md

userStories.title: Config and validation library
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a config and validation module for school staff interaction so that form data can be validated consistently on save and complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/lib/school-staff-interaction.ts` with `SCHOOL_STAFF_INTERACTION_CONFIG` (1 section 'General Check', 2 questions: `gc_staff_concern`, `gc_pertaining_issue`)
Export `SchoolStaffInteractionData` interface with `questions` record (no teachers/students/grade)
Export `validateSchoolStaffInteractionSave()` -- lenient: accepts empty/partial, rejects unknown top-level keys
Export `validateSchoolStaffInteractionComplete()` -- strict: requires all 2 questions answered with non-null boolean, reports question labels in errors
Create `src/lib/school-staff-interaction.test.ts` with ~20 tests (config integrity, lenient validation, strict validation)
Tests pass (`npm run test`)
Types check (`npx tsc --noEmit`)

userStories.title: Type registry update
userStories.description: As a developer, I need `school_staff_interaction` registered in `ACTION_TYPES` so the system recognizes it as a valid action type.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `school_staff_interaction: 'School Staff Interaction'` to `ACTION_TYPES` in `src/lib/visit-actions.ts`
Total action types becomes 7
Update `src/lib/visit-actions.test.ts`: add to exhaustive record, change expected length from 6 to 7, add `isActionType` and `getActionTypeLabel` assertions
Tests pass (`npm run test`)
Types check (`npx tsc --noEmit`)

userStories.title: PATCH API validation
userStories.description: As a PM, when I save school staff interaction data, the API should validate it (lenient for in-progress, strict for completed actions).
acceptanceCriteria: Import validation functions in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/route.ts`
Add `school_staff_interaction` validation block after `individual_student_discussion` (lenient for `in_progress`, strict for `completed`)
Error message: 'Invalid school staff interaction data'
Add `buildValidSchoolStaffInteractionData()` builder to test file
Add 4 tests: lenient valid, lenient invalid (unknown keys), strict invalid (incomplete), strict valid (complete)
Tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: END API validation
userStories.description: As a PM, when I end a school staff interaction action, the API should validate all 2 questions are answered.
acceptanceCriteria: Import `validateSchoolStaffInteractionComplete` in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/end/route.ts`
Add `schoolStaffInteractionValidationError()` function following the `principalInteractionValidationError` pattern
Wire into both primary and concurrent-fallback validation chains
Error message: 'Invalid school staff interaction data' with validation errors array
Add `buildValidSchoolStaffInteractionData()` builder to test file
Add 5 tests: incomplete rejected, null data rejected, complete succeeds, all-null rejected, concurrent fallback validates
Tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Visit completion -- 7th required type
userStories.description: As a PM, I cannot complete a visit without at least one completed school staff interaction action.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 7th completion check in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/complete/route.ts` after `individual_student_discussion`
Sequential short-circuit order: in-progress -> classroom -> AF team -> individual teacher -> principal -> group student -> individual student -> school staff -> UPDATE
Error message: 'At least one completed School Staff Interaction is required to complete visit'
Update 3 existing happy-path tests: add `.mockResolvedValueOnce([{ id: 901 }])` for new type check, shift UPDATE mock index by +1
Rename test 'all 6 action types' to 'all 7 action types'
Add 1 new test: 'returns 422 when school_staff_interaction is missing'
Tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Form component
userStories.description: As a PM, I need a form to answer the 2 school staff interaction questions with Yes/No radios and optional remarks.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/components/visits/SchoolStaffInteractionForm.tsx` following `PrincipalInteractionForm.tsx` pattern
Props: `{ data, setData, disabled }` -- no `schoolCode`
Sticky progress bar showing 'Answered: X/2' at `top-12 z-10`
1 section 'General Check' with 2 questions, each with Yes/No radios and optional remark toggle
`data-testid='action-renderer-school_staff_interaction'` on outer div
Radio test IDs: `school-staff-interaction-{key}-yes`, `school-staff-interaction-{key}-no`
Disabled mode: radios disabled, no 'Add remark' buttons
Create `src/components/visits/SchoolStaffInteractionForm.test.tsx` with ~12 tests (rendering, interactions, progress, remarks, disabled mode)
Tests pass (`npm run test`)
Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
Build passes (`npm run build`)

userStories.title: Wire form into ActionDetailForm dispatcher
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to wire the new form component into the existing action detail form dispatcher so it renders for `school_staff_interaction` actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Import `SchoolStaffInteractionForm` and `SCHOOL_STAFF_INTERACTION_CONFIG` in `ActionDetailForm.tsx`
Add `SCHOOL_STAFF_INTERACTION_ACTION_TYPE` constant
Add to `SAVE_BEFORE_END_TYPES` Set
Add `ACTION_FORM_CONFIGS` entry with title 'School Staff Interaction Details', description 'Record interactions with school staff regarding the program.', fields: []
Add `sanitizeSchoolStaffInteractionPayload()` function (copy principal interaction pattern)
Add `bootstrapSchoolStaffInteractionPayload()` function
Add branches in `normalizeFormDataForAction` and `sanitizePatchData`
Add `SchoolStaffInteractionForm` branch in JSX renderer dispatch
Generic END 422 error message falls through correctly (do NOT add custom branch)
Tests pass (`npm run test`)
Types check (`npx tsc --noEmit`)

userStories.title: Action card stats
userStories.description: As a PM, I want to see how many questions I've answered on the action card so I can track progress at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Import `SCHOOL_STAFF_INTERACTION_CONFIG` in `ActionPointList.tsx`
Add exported `getSchoolStaffInteractionStats()` function returning answered count / total (2)
Render stats on `school_staff_interaction` action cards (answered/total with %)
Add 9 tests in `ActionPointList.test.tsx` (3 card rendering + 6 stats function unit tests)
Add 2 tests in `ActionTypePickerModal.test.tsx` (selectable + submit)
Add 3 tests in action detail `page.test.tsx` (renderer dispatch, PATCH save, save-before-end)
Tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: E2E tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need E2E tests to verify the full flow works end-to-end including visit completion with 7 required types.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `buildCompleteSchoolStaffInteractionData()` builder in `e2e/helpers/db.ts` with import from `../../src/lib/school-staff-interaction`
Update 4 existing E2E completion tests (lines 399, 445, 578, 849) with 7th seed for `school_staff_interaction`
Rename test at line 849 from 'six' to 'seven' + add card visibility assertion + update comment
Add new E2E test `visit-completion-requires-school-staff-interaction` (seed 6 types, omit school staff, assert 422 error)
Add E2E form workflow test `pm-creates-starts-fills-and-ends-school-staff-interaction` (create -> start -> fill -> end)
E2E tests pass (`npm run test:e2e`)

userStories.title: Documentation updates
userStories.description: As a developer, I need CLAUDE.md and project-context.md updated so future contributors have accurate documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: Update CLAUDE.md Project Overview paragraph to include school staff interaction
Add 'PM Visits: School Staff Interaction (v1)' section to CLAUDE.md
Update visit completion rule: 6 -> 7 required types in CLAUDE.md
Update test file inventory and counts in CLAUDE.md (use fresh `npx vitest run` output)
Add School Staff Interaction subsection under section 3.5 in `docs/ai/project-context.md`
Fix stale action type references in project-context.md (lines 154, 251-252, 271, 272, 285)

userStories.title: Review changes and document findings
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to review all changes made during this feature implementation to ensure nothing was missed and document the results.
acceptanceCriteria: Use explore agents to understand the current state of modified files
Review git diff to see all changes made
Run `npx vitest run` and capture test count + coverage numbers
Run `npm run test:e2e` and verify all E2E tests pass
Verify no unintended side effects or missing pieces
Create `ralph/school-staff-interaction-review.txt` with concise findings (under 50 lines)
Review file summarizes: what was done, files changed, test counts, coverage numbers, any concerns or recommendations
